export class DoorDashOrderComposer{/**
     * orderType:
     * 1 = Pizza Delivery (you can add more types later if you like)
     */constructor(){let orderType=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:1;this._data=void 0;const type=Math.max(1,Math.floor(orderType||1));this._data=[type];console.log('[📤] DoorDashOrderComposer packet sent:',this._data);}getMessageArray(){return this._data;}dispose(){return;}}
